description: Pixel art for emojig about screens. Mode 'quad' maps 2×2 pixel blocks to terminal cells using U+2596–U+259F block chars. Each shape row is a sequence of palette chars (one char per pixel column); odd_cols=true means alternate chars are visual separators and are ignored.
